title: Unable to get anything from podman in rootless on armhf
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**
I'm currently unable to get anything from podman. No output gets shown. When running as rootfull, it seems to work correctly.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Run any podman comand

**Describe the results you received:**
No output for any command

**Describe the results you expected:**
Any output

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**
Running rootless with `--log-level debug`. Note that the two warnings for `no valid executable found for OCI runtime` for `kata`, and `crun` not being found seems to also happen when running as `root`.
```
$ podman ps --log-level debug
INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level debug
DEBU[0000] Called ps.PersistentPreRunE(podman ps --log-level debug)
DEBU[0000] Reading configuration file "/usr/share/containers/containers.conf"
DEBU[0000] Merged system config "/usr/share/containers/containers.conf": &{Containers:{Devices:[] Volumes:[] ApparmorProfile:containers-default-0.22.0 Annotations:[] CgroupNS:host Cgroups:enabled DefaultCapabilities:[CAP_AUDIT_WRITE CAP_CHOWN CAP_DAC_OVERRIDE CAP_FOWNER CAP_FSETID CAP_KILL CAP_MKNOD CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE CAP_NET_RAW CAP_SETFCAP CAP_SETGID CAP_SETPCAP CAP_SETUID CAP_SYS_CHROOT] DefaultSysctls:[] DefaultUlimits:[] DefaultMountsFile: DNSServers:[] DNSOptions:[] DNSSearches:[] EnableLabeling:false Env:[PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin TERM=xterm] EnvHost:false HTTPProxy:false Init:false InitPath: IPCNS:private LogDriver:k8s-file LogSizeMax:-1 NetNS:slirp4netns NoHosts:false PidsLimit:2048 PidNS:private SeccompProfile:/usr/share/containers/seccomp.json ShmSize:65536k TZ: Umask:0022 UTSNS:private UserNS:host UserNSSize:65536} Engine:{CgroupCheck:false CgroupManager:cgroupfs ConmonEnvVars:[PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin] ConmonPath:[/usr/libexec/podman/conmon /usr/local/libexec/podman/conmon /usr/local/lib/podman/conmon /usr/bin/conmon /usr/sbin/conmon /usr/local/bin/conmon /usr/local/sbin/conmon /run/current-system/sw/bin/conmon] DetachKeys:ctrl-p,ctrl-q EnablePortReservation:true Env:[] EventsLogFilePath:/tmp/run-1000/libpod/tmp/events/events.log EventsLogger:journald HooksDir:[/usr/share/containers/oci/hooks.d] ImageDefaultTransport:docker:// InfraCommand:/pause InfraImage:k8s.gcr.io/pause:3.2 InitPath:/usr/libexec/podman/catatonit LockType:shm MultiImageArchive:false Namespace: NetworkCmdPath: NoPivotRoot:false NumLocks:2048 OCIRuntime:runc OCIRuntimes:map[crun:[/usr/bin/crun /usr/sbin/crun /usr/local/bin/crun /usr/local/sbin/crun /sbin/crun /bin/crun /run/current-system/sw/bin/crun] kata:[/usr/bin/kata-runtime /usr/sbin/kata-runtime /usr/local/bin/kata-runtime /usr/local/sbin/kata-runtime /sbin/kata-runtime /bin/kata-runtime /usr/bin/kata-qemu /usr/bin/kata-fc] runc:[/usr/lib/cri-o-runc/sbin/runc /usr/sbin/runc /usr/bin/runc /usr/local/bin/runc /usr/local/sbin/runc /sbin/runc /bin/runc]] PullPolicy:missing Remote:false RemoteURI: RemoteIdentity: ActiveService: ServiceDestinations:map[] RuntimePath:[] RuntimeSupportsJSON:[crun runc] RuntimeSupportsNoCgroups:[crun] RuntimeSupportsKVM:[kata kata-runtime kata-qemu kata-fc] SetOptions:{StorageConfigRunRootSet:false StorageConfigGraphRootSet:false StorageConfigGraphDriverNameSet:false StaticDirSet:false VolumePathSet:false TmpDirSet:false} SignaturePolicyPath:/etc/containers/policy.json SDNotify:false StateType:3 StaticDir:/home/dietpi/.local/share/containers/storage/libpod StopTimeout:10 TmpDir:/tmp/run-1000/libpod/tmp VolumePath:/home/dietpi/.local/share/containers/storage/volumes} Network:{CNIPluginDirs:[/usr/libexec/cni /usr/lib/cni /usr/local/lib/cni /opt/cni/bin] DefaultNetwork:podman NetworkConfigDir:/home/dietpi/.config/cni/net.d}}
DEBU[0000] Reading configuration file "/etc/containers/containers.conf"
DEBU[0000] Merged system config "/etc/containers/containers.conf": &{Containers:{Devices:[] Volumes:[] ApparmorProfile:containers-default-0.22.0 Annotations:[] CgroupNS:host Cgroups:enabled DefaultCapabilities:[CAP_AUDIT_WRITE CAP_CHOWN CAP_DAC_OVERRIDE CAP_FOWNER CAP_FSETID CAP_KILL CAP_MKNOD CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE CAP_NET_RAW CAP_SETFCAP CAP_SETGID CAP_SETPCAP CAP_SETUID CAP_SYS_CHROOT] DefaultSysctls:[] DefaultUlimits:[] DefaultMountsFile: DNSServers:[] DNSOptions:[] DNSSearches:[] EnableLabeling:false Env:[PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin TERM=xterm] EnvHost:false HTTPProxy:false Init:false InitPath: IPCNS:private LogDriver:k8s-file LogSizeMax:-1 NetNS:slirp4netns NoHosts:false PidsLimit:2048 PidNS:private SeccompProfile:/usr/share/containers/seccomp.json ShmSize:65536k TZ: Umask:0022 UTSNS:private UserNS:host UserNSSize:65536} Engine:{CgroupCheck:false CgroupManager:cgroupfs ConmonEnvVars:[PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin] ConmonPath:[/usr/libexec/podman/conmon /usr/local/libexec/podman/conmon /usr/local/lib/podman/conmon /usr/bin/conmon /usr/sbin/conmon /usr/local/bin/conmon /usr/local/sbin/conmon /run/current-system/sw/bin/conmon] DetachKeys:ctrl-p,ctrl-q EnablePortReservation:true Env:[] EventsLogFilePath:/tmp/run-1000/libpod/tmp/events/events.log EventsLogger:journald HooksDir:[/usr/share/containers/oci/hooks.d] ImageDefaultTransport:docker:// InfraCommand:/pause InfraImage:k8s.gcr.io/pause:3.2 InitPath:/usr/libexec/podman/catatonit LockType:shm MultiImageArchive:false Namespace: NetworkCmdPath: NoPivotRoot:false NumLocks:2048 OCIRuntime:runc OCIRuntimes:map[crun:[/usr/bin/crun /usr/sbin/crun /usr/local/bin/crun /usr/local/sbin/crun /sbin/crun /bin/crun /run/current-system/sw/bin/crun] kata:[/usr/bin/kata-runtime /usr/sbin/kata-runtime /usr/local/bin/kata-runtime /usr/local/sbin/kata-runtime /sbin/kata-runtime /bin/kata-runtime /usr/bin/kata-qemu /usr/bin/kata-fc] runc:[/usr/lib/cri-o-runc/sbin/runc /usr/sbin/runc /usr/bin/runc /usr/local/bin/runc /usr/local/sbin/runc /sbin/runc /bin/runc]] PullPolicy:missing Remote:false RemoteURI: RemoteIdentity: ActiveService: ServiceDestinations:map[] RuntimePath:[] RuntimeSupportsJSON:[crun runc] RuntimeSupportsNoCgroups:[crun] RuntimeSupportsKVM:[kata kata-runtime kata-qemu kata-fc] SetOptions:{StorageConfigRunRootSet:false StorageConfigGraphRootSet:false StorageConfigGraphDriverNameSet:false StaticDirSet:false VolumePathSet:false TmpDirSet:false} SignaturePolicyPath:/etc/containers/policy.json SDNotify:false StateType:3 StaticDir:/home/dietpi/.local/share/containers/storage/libpod StopTimeout:10 TmpDir:/tmp/run-1000/libpod/tmp VolumePath:/home/dietpi/.local/share/containers/storage/volumes} Network:{CNIPluginDirs:[/usr/libexec/cni /usr/lib/cni /usr/local/lib/cni /opt/cni/bin] DefaultNetwork:podman NetworkConfigDir:/home/dietpi/.config/cni/net.d}}
DEBU[0000] Using conmon: "/usr/libexec/podman/conmon"
DEBU[0000] Initializing boltdb state at /home/dietpi/.local/share/containers/storage/libpod/bolt_state.db
DEBU[0000] Using graph driver vfs
DEBU[0000] Using graph root /home/dietpi/.local/share/containers/storage
DEBU[0000] Using run root /tmp/run-1000/containers
DEBU[0000] Using static dir /home/dietpi/.local/share/containers/storage/libpod
DEBU[0000] Using tmp dir /tmp/run-1000/libpod/tmp
DEBU[0000] Using volume path /home/dietpi/.local/share/containers/storage/volumes
DEBU[0000] Set libpod namespace to ""
DEBU[0000] Not configuring container store
DEBU[0000] Initializing event backend journald
WARN[0000] Error initializing configured OCI runtime crun: no valid executable found for OCI runtime crun: invalid argument
WARN[0000] Error initializing configured OCI runtime kata: no valid executable found for OCI runtime kata: invalid argument
DEBU[0000] using runtime "/usr/sbin/runc"
```

**Output of `podman version`:**
Nothing when running as rootless, below is rootfull
```
$ sudo podman version
Version:      2.1.1
API Version:  2.0.0
Go Version:   go1.15.2
Built:        Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:      linux/arm
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**
Nothing when running as rootless, below is rootfull
```
$ sudo podman info --debug
host:
  arch: arm
  buildahVersion: 1.16.1
  cgroupManager: systemd
  cgroupVersion: v1
  conmon:
    package: 'conmon: /usr/libexec/podman/conmon'
    path: /usr/libexec/podman/conmon
    version: 'conmon version 2.0.20, commit: '
  cpus: 4
  distribution:
    distribution: raspbian
    version: "10"
  eventLogger: journald
  hostname: DietPi
  idMappings:
    gidmap: null
    uidmap: null
  kernel: 5.4.72-v7+
  linkmode: dynamic
  memFree: 670572544
  memTotal: 1021718528
  ociRuntime:
    name: runc
    package: 'runc: /usr/sbin/runc'
    path: /usr/sbin/runc
    version: |-
      runc version 1.0.0~rc6+dfsg1
      commit: 1.0.0~rc6+dfsg1-3
      spec: 1.0.1
  os: linux
  remoteSocket:
    path: /run/podman/podman.sock
  rootless: false
  slirp4netns:
    executable: ""
    package: ""
    version: ""
  swapFree: 1124855808
  swapTotal: 1125117952
  uptime: 160h 4m 35.42s (Approximately 6.67 days)
registries:
  search:
  - docker.io
  - quay.io
store:
  configFile: /etc/containers/storage.conf
  containerStore:
    number: 5
    paused: 0
    running: 4
    stopped: 1
  graphDriverName: overlay
  graphOptions: {}
  graphRoot: /media/ext/podman
  graphStatus:
    Backing Filesystem: extfs
    Native Overlay Diff: "true"
    Supports d_type: "true"
    Using metacopy: "false"
  imageStore:
    number: 4
  runRoot: /var/run/containers/storage
  volumePath: /media/ext/podman/volumes
version:
  APIVersion: 2.0.0
  Built: 0
  BuiltTime: Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
  GitCommit: ""
  GoVersion: go1.15.2
  OsArch: linux/arm
  Version: 2.1.1
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
$ dpkg -l podman
Desired=Unknown/Install/Remove/Purge/Hold
| Status=Not/Inst/Conf-files/Unpacked/halF-conf/Half-inst/trig-aWait/Trig-pend
|/ Err?=(none)/Reinst-required (Status,Err: uppercase=bad)
||/ Name           Version      Architecture Description
+++-==============-============-============-=============================================
ii  podman         2.1.1~2      armhf        Manage pods, containers and container images.
```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide?**

Yes:
```
$ sudo apt-get install podman
Reading package lists... Done
Building dependency tree
Reading state information... Done
podman is already the newest version (2.1.1~2).
0 upgraded, 0 newly installed, 0 to remove and 0 not upgraded.
```

Also yes, I have followed the troubleshooting guide.

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**
Raspberry pi 3b+

comments.body:
Can you try 'podman unshare' as rootless? It should open a shell in our
rootless user namespace. I'd be interested to know if that produces output.

A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Can you update to the latest podman version and see if you still have an issue.

Please also look at the versions of fuse-overlayfs and slirp4netns that you have. On Fedora these are the current versions.
podman-2.2.1-1.fc33.x86_64
fuse-overlayfs-1.3.0-1.fc33.x86_64
slirp4netns-1.1.8-1.fc33.x86_64

You might want to check these as well.
conmon-2.0.22-2.fc33.x86_64
crun-0.16-3.fc33.x86_64

Sorry for the reply. So I'm missing `slirp4netns`, `fuse-overlayfs` and `crun` from the repos. The other two are up to date. Sounds like perhaps this could my issue. I do wonder how podman works without `fuse-overlayfs` and `crun`? I know `slirp4netns` is for  rootless networking, but I'm not sure if it's a similar story with the other two. I will install it later today and test it.
Podman will work with runc, and rootful mode does not require fuse-overlay.  Neither does rootless, although not using it requires the "vfs" driver which is not ideal.

So I was about to comment with a different error that I thought was caused by the additional installed packages, but as I was writing the comment, I realised I hadn't posted the new `podman info` output, so figured I was going to add that too. When I ran the command, I noticed that, unlike what I had said before, podman version was still at `2.1.1`. So after investigating, turns out apt was not upgrading it due to the required version of libseccomp2 not being available in the repos (latest versions available in the repos was a little older than required). So I decided to delete all the podman and related packages, and downloaded `libseccomp2` from the sid repos, and installed, then re-installed podman and related packages, and it's all working like it should. Thank you for your help.
